arts.image: In the Blink of an Eye.png
arts.title: In the Blink of an Eye
arts.description: my first ever digital drawing with ibisPaint. it was supposed to depict me medicated vs unmedicated, and/or how I can go from happy to depressed “in the blink of an eye”. I'm still proud of it to this day.

arts.title: AetherRedrawzs
arts.description: my own take on Aether, Sleepy's OC and then-persona. named after her Twitch handle, which at the time was AetherDrawzs.

arts.title: Fun in the Snow
arts.description: this picture depicts Sarah dressed in winter clothes, making a snow angel. I don't remember if I ever officially considered it finished.

arts.title: Two Young Ladies
arts.description:
this image depicts a child Sarah looking at a ladybug on her hand.
this image still disturbs me today.

arts.title: KISSK
arts.description: this is another self-portrait. the name was supposed to be an acronym, though for what I don't remember – my best guess is “kind, intelligent, sweet, silly kid”.

arts.title: Sillies Being Silly
arts.description:
this is an image I drew for Sleepy's birthday. it includes (left to right, top to bottom) Ether, Aether, Sarah, and them. I am happy with how Aether and more so Ether came out. Sarah and Sleepy, not so much.
note: the date is speculation. I lost the original IPV file for this art – the date is based off of the only export I have.

arts.title: Selaso
arts.description: first ever appearance of Selaso, one of my OCs. since then her appearance has changed a bit, but still mostly the same.

arts.title: Just Sarah.
arts.description: this is supposed to be a parody of Act 3 of ｢Doki Doki Literature Club!｣ with Sarah, one of my OCs. she is supposed to be sitting in a bean bag, the context being similar to the source material.

arts.title: Aether Aether
arts.description:
drawing of Sleepy's OC (and then-persona) “Aether” about to make an Aether portal (as in, the ｢Minecraft｣ mod). terible joke, I know.
this artwork is actually the one I'm most proud of. I think it turned out the best. ^.^

in this picture, Selaso is laying on her bed having a moment of depression/contemplation.
the thoughts roughly tranlate to “what is existence? why do I exist? everything is wierd.”.

arts.title: relAIxation
arts.description: a trace of a photograph of the Neuro-sama V2 plushie. the scene is supposed to be a beach.

arts.title: Drawing 8
arts.description: pixel art traces of the poemgame chibis from ｢Doki Doki Literature Club!｣, using the standard PICO-8 palette.

arts.title: Drawing 7
arts.description: simple pixel art drawing of Vedal and the Neuro twins using the extended PICO-8 palette. I submitted it to Neurocord and it never got reviewed T-T

arts.title: Drawing 47
arts.description: Neuro-sama riding a happy ghast from ｢Minecraft｣. another one that was submitted to Neurocord and never reviewed.

arts.title: B
arts.description:
a more feminized depiction of Selili, this was mostly traced from a drawing of Rosa from ｢Pokémon Black 2 & White 2｣ sourced from Pixiv, the original author of which I can't recall.
I used this as my pfp for a while, until my mom questioned why it “depicted me with breasts”. -_-

albums.name: In a Heartbeat OST
albums.subtitle: (side A)
albums.description: these songs were created for ｢In a Heartbeat｣, a game I never finished. it was supposed to be a visual novel dating sim made in LÖVE with PICO-8-inspired visuals.

albums.name: In a Heartbeat OST
albums.subtitle: (side B)
albums.description: these are some bonus songs made for the ｢In a Heartbeat｣ soundtrack. none of them were in the game.

songs.name: The Only One I Trust
songs.subtitle: (Restarted Version)
songs.file: 5 The Only One I Trust (Restarted Version).mp3

albums.name: PICO PICO Literature Club! OST
albums.description: PICO-8 versions of some of ｢DDLC｣'s OST. I was half-planning on actually demaking it into PICO-8 and using these songs.

albums.name: other covers
albums.description: all other covers that aren't in their own album
